basic_details.job_title: Directorate of Lighthouses and Lightships Navigational Assistant Recruitment 2026 - Apply Offline
basic_details.short_information: Directorate of Lighthouses and Lightships (DGLL) Navigational Assistant Grade-III Recruitment 2026 Notification has been released on the official website dgll.gov.in. A total of 2 vacancies have been announced through the DGLL Navigational Assistant Grade-III Recruitment 2026.

age_limit.details: Minimum Age: 18 years Maximum Age: 27 years Age relaxation will be applicable as per prevalent Central Govt. rules.

qualification.education_qualification: Diploma in Electronics or Telecommunication or Electronics and Communication or Electrical and Electronics
qualification.details: Navigational Assistant Grade-III: Diploma in Electronics or Telecommunication or Electronics and Communication or Electrical and Electronics from an institution recognized by Central Government or State Government.

selection_process: Written Examination Trade Test Document Verification
how_to_apply: Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Download the application form from the official website: www.dgll.gov.in.
Fill the application form carefully with correct information.
Attach self-attested copies of required documents such as photograph, signature, ID proof, and certificates.
Check all details carefully before submission.
Send the completed application form to the address mentioned in the notification through Speed Post / Registered Post or as instructed.
Ensure the application reaches before the last date: 18-05-2026.
Keep a photocopy of the submitted application form for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the Directorate of Lighthouses and Lightships Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The last date to receive the application for the Navigational Assistant Grade-III post is 18th May 2026. Candidates residing in specific remote regions have the same last date.

faq.question: Q2. What is the educational qualification required for the Navigational Assistant Grade-III post?
faq.answer: Candidates must possess a Diploma in Electronics or Telecommunication or Electronics and Communication or Electrical and Electronics from a recognized institution.

faq.question: Q3. What is the age limit for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The minimum age limit is 18 years and the maximum age limit is 27 years. Age relaxation is applicable as per Central Government rules.

faq.question: Q4. How many vacancies are available for the Navigational Assistant Grade-III post?
faq.answer: There are a total of 2 vacancies for the post of Navigational Assistant Grade-III in this recruitment drive.

faq.question: Q5. What is the application mode for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The application mode for this recruitment is offline. Candidates need to send their applications by post.

faq.question: Q6. What is the salary offered for the Navigational Assistant Grade-III position?
faq.answer: The selected candidates will be placed in Pay Level-5, which offers a decent salary as per government norms.

faq.question: Q7. What are the selection stages for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The selection process includes a Written Examination, Trade Test, and Document Verification.

faq.question: Q8. Where should I send the application form?
faq.answer: Completed applications should be sent by speed post or registered post to "The Director, Directorate of Lighthouses and Lightships, 'Deep Bhavan', 44 - Bhagat Singh Road, Phoenix Bay, Sri Vijaya Puram, Andaman and Nicobar Islands - 744101".

faq.question: Q9. Is there any application fee for this post?
faq.answer: No application fee is mentioned in the official notification for any category of candidates.

faq.question: Q10. What is the official website of the Directorate of Lighthouses and Lightships?
faq.answer: The official website of the Directorate of Lighthouses and Lightships is www.dgll.gov.in, where you can find more details and download the application form.
